LanguageData.PawnDiaryRimTalkBridge.Settings.RimTalkM: RimTalk is not in the active mod list, so the bridge is idle. Settings below still save.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryRimTalkBridge.Settings.LevelOff: No data flows between Pawn Diary and RimTalk in either direction.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryRimTalkBridge.Settings.LevelSha: Pawns remember their diary in conversation: recent diary memories flow into RimTalk prompts, and each pawn's RimTalk persona is visible to the diary as context. No entries are created from chat.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryRimTalkBridge.Settings.LevelCon: Everything above, plus important RimTalk conversations (arguments, kindness, urgent news, long exchanges) become diary entries for both participants. Ordinary chatter stays in the ambient day note handled by Pawn Diary itself.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryRimTalkBridge.Settings.IncludeD: Include diary-voice line in chat context
Adds one line describing how the pawn writes their diary to the RimTalk prompt section, so chat can echo the same voice.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryRimTalkBridge.Settings.PersonaL: Shapes each pawn's diary writing voice from their RimTalk character description. Experimental: a character description is a cruder voice rule than the curated diary styles. Turning this off restores the normal styles.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryRimTalkBridge.Settings.UseRimTa: Write conversation entries through RimTalk's AI
Uses RimTalk's configured AI provider to write the bridge's conversation entries instead of Pawn Diary's own provider. Falls back to the normal path when RimTalk's AI is busy or fails.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryRimTalkBridge.Settings.DevChatL: Logs every observed RimTalk chat line and every bridge decision (conversation flushes, importance reasons, throttling, submissions) to the dev console.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryRimTalkBridge.Settings.MinRepli: Chat lines that make a talk important
LanguageData.PawnDiaryRimTalkBridge.Settings.PerPawnD: Conversation entries per pawn per day
LanguageData.PawnDiaryRimTalkBridge.Settings.ColonyDa: Conversation entries per colony per day
LanguageData.PawnDiaryRimTalkBridge.Prompt.DiaryVaria: Recent Pawn Diary memories for this pawn, plus an optional line describing their diary-writing voice.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryRimTalkBridge.Persona.LensRule: This pawn reads events through who they are: {0}
LanguageData.PawnDiaryRimTalkBridge.Event.Conversatio: Write what this conversation stirred or changed for the writer — the feeling and aftermath, not a transcript.
